tables.name: new_taz
tables.label: New TAZs
tables.description: Draft new Traffic Analysis Zones (CTPS Boston region) with 2019 demographics and 2049 projections. Imported from TAZ_Delta_Tool new_taz.geojson; lat/lon are polygon centroids.

tables.name: old_taz
tables.label: Old TAZs
tables.description: Current TDM23 (2017g) Traffic Analysis Zones. Imported from TAZ_Delta_Tool old_taz.geojson; lat/lon are polygon centroids.

tables.name: towns
tables.label: Towns
tables.description: Per-town delta: old vs new TAZ counts plus summed new-TAZ demographics. Computed at import time.

tables.name: corridors
tables.label: Transit corridors
tables.description: Top town-to-town home-based-work transit desire lines from the four-step model (transit4). Regenerated by tools/transit4/worker.py.

tables.name: model_run
tables.label: Model run
tables.description: Headline scalars for the most recent four-step model run (one row). Regenerated by tools/transit4/worker.py.
